// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using OpenTelemetry.Trace;
using TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData;

namespace TraceUtils.Extensions;

public static class AllSignaturesMethodsGroupedTelemetryExtensions
{
    public static void VoidNoParamsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("VoidNoParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события VoidNoParams"));
            instance.VoidNoParams();

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события VoidNoParams"));
        }
    }

    public static void VoidWithParamsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int id, string name)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("VoidWithParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.id", id);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.name", name);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события VoidWithParams"));
            instance.VoidWithParams(id, name);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события VoidWithParams"));
        }
    }

    public static void VoidWithDefaultsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int retryCount = 3, int timeout = 5000)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("VoidWithDefaults", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.retryCount", retryCount);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.timeout", timeout);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события VoidWithDefaults"));
            instance.VoidWithDefaults(retryCount, timeout);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события VoidWithDefaults"));
        }
    }

        catch (Exception ex)

        }
    }

    public static double CalculateWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, double x, double y)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("Calculate", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.x", x);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.y", y);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события Calculate"));
            return instance.Calculate(x, y);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события Calculate"));
        }
    }

    public static string GetConfigWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string key, string defaultValue = "default")
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GetConfig", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.key", key);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.defaultValue", defaultValue);

        try

            return instance.GetConfig(key, defaultValue);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

            activity?.AddException(ex);

    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task AsyncTaskNoParamsWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncTaskNoParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncTaskNoParams"));
            await instance.AsyncTaskNoParams();

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncTaskNoParams"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task AsyncTaskWithParamsWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string userId, string action)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncTaskWithParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.userId", userId);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.action", action);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncTaskWithParams"));
            await instance.AsyncTaskWithParams(userId, action);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncTaskWithParams"));
        }
    }

    {

        activity?.SetTag("arg.operation", operation);

        try

            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncTaskWithCancellation"));
            await instance.AsyncTaskWithCancellation(operation, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncFetchWithDefaults", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.category", category);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.maxItems", maxItems);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncFetchWithDefaults"));
            return await instance.AsyncFetchWithDefaults(category, maxItems, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

    public static TOutput GenericTransformWithTrace<TInput, TOutput>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TInput source, Func<TInput, TOutput> converter)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericTransform", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.source", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(source));
        activity?.SetTag("arg.converter", converter);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события GenericTransform"));
            return instance.GenericTransform<TInput, TOutput>(source, converter);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события GenericTransform"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task GenericMultipleConstraintsWithTraceAsync<T>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, T entity, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) where T : class, IDisposable, new()
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericMultipleConstraints", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.entity", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(entity));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события GenericMultipleConstraints"));
            await instance.GenericMultipleConstraints<T>(entity, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события GenericMultipleConstraints"));
        }
    }

    public static bool MethodWithInWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in DateTime timestamp, int threshold)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithIn", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.timestamp", timestamp);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.threshold", threshold);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithIn"));
            return instance.MethodWithIn(in timestamp, threshold);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithIn"));
        }
    }

    public static bool MethodWithOutWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string input, out int result)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithOut", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.input", input);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithOut"));
            var __traceResult = instance.MethodWithOut(input, out result);
            activity?.SetTag("arg.result", result);
                return __traceResult;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithOut"));
        }
    }

    public static void MethodWithRefWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, ref int counter, int increment)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithRef", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.counter", counter);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.increment", increment);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithRef"));
            instance.MethodWithRef(ref counter, increment);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithRef"));
        }
    }

    public static int MethodWithParamsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string operation, params int[] values)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.operation", operation);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.values", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(values));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithParams"));
            return instance.MethodWithParams(operation, values);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithParams"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Dictionary<string, object>> MethodWithCollectionsWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, IReadOnlyList<string> keys, IDictionary<string, string> options)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithCollections", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.keys", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(keys));
        activity?.SetTag("arg.options", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(options));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithCollections"));
            return await instance.MethodWithCollections(keys, options);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithCollections"));
        }
    }

    public static (bool success, string message, int code) MethodReturningTupleWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string operation)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodReturningTuple", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.operation", operation);

        try
        {

            return instance.MethodReturningTuple(operation);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)

            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodReturningTuple"));
        }
    }

    {

        activity?.SetTag("arg.filter", filter);

    public static string? MethodWithNullableWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int? id, string? fallback = null)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithNullable", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.id", id);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.fallback", fallback);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithNullable"));
            return instance.MethodWithNullable(id, fallback);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithNullable"));
        }
    }

    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithMemory", ActivityKind.Internal);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithMemory"));
            return await instance.MethodWithMemory(buffer, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithMemory"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task MethodWithCallbackWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string data, Action<string> onComplete, Action<Exception>? onError = default)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithCallback", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.data", data);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithCallback"));
            await instance.MethodWithCallback(data, onComplete, onError);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithCallback"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResult> MethodWithGenericCallbackWithTraceAsync<TInput, TResult>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TInput input, Func<TInput, System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResult>> processor)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithGenericCallback", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.input", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(input));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithGenericCallback"));
            return await instance.MethodWithGenericCallback<TInput, TResult>(input, processor);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithGenericCallback"));
        }
    }

    public static IEnumerable<TOutput> CovariantMethodWithTrace<TInput, TOutput>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, IEnumerable<TInput> items) where TOutput : TInput
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("CovariantMethod", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.items", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(items));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события CovariantMethod"));
            return instance.CovariantMethod<TInput, TOutput>(items);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события CovariantMethod"));
        }
    }

    public static void ContravariantMethodWithTrace<T>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, Action<T> handler, T data)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ContravariantMethod", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.handler", handler);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.data", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(data));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события ContravariantMethod"));
            instance.ContravariantMethod<T>(handler, data);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события ContravariantMethod"));
        }
    }

    public static void MethodWithEnumWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, long userId, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind userKind)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithEnum", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.userId", userId);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.userKind", userKind);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithEnum"));
            instance.MethodWithEnum(userId, userKind);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithEnum"));
        }
    }

    public static TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind MethodReturningEnumWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string email)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodReturningEnum", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.email", email);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodReturningEnum"));
            return instance.MethodReturningEnum(email);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodReturningEnum"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<int> AsyncMethodWithEnumDefaultWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind = TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind.Unknown, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncMethodWithEnumDefault", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.kind", kind);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncMethodWithEnumDefault"));
            return await instance.AsyncMethodWithEnumDefault(kind, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncMethodWithEnumDefault"));
        }
    }

    public static bool MethodWithNullableEnumWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind? kind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind fallbackKind = TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind.Internal)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithNullableEnum", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.kind", kind);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.fallbackKind", fallbackKind);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithNullableEnum"));
            return instance.MethodWithNullableEnum(kind, fallbackKind);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithNullableEnum"));
        }
    }

    public static void MethodWithClassDtoWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto profile)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithClassDto", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.profile.ProfileId", profile.ProfileId);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.profile.Email", profile.Email);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithClassDto"));
            instance.MethodWithClassDto(profile);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithClassDto"));
        }
    }

    public static TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto MethodReturningClassDtoWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, long profileId)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodReturningClassDto", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.profileId", profileId);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodReturningClassDto"));
            return instance.MethodReturningClassDto(profileId);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodReturningClassDto"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool> AsyncMethodWithNullableClassDtoWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto? profile, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncMethodWithNullableClassDto", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.profile.ProfileId", profile?.ProfileId);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.profile.Email", profile?.Email);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncMethodWithNullableClassDto"));
            return await instance.AsyncMethodWithNullableClassDto(profile, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncMethodWithNullableClassDto"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto?> AsyncMethodReturningNullableClassDtoWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string? email)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncMethodReturningNullableClassDto", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.email", email);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncMethodReturningNullableClassDto"));
            return await instance.AsyncMethodReturningNullableClassDto(email);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncMethodReturningNullableClassDto"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<List<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto>> MethodWithClassDtoCollectionWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, IEnumerable<long> profileIds, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithClassDtoCollection", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.profileIds", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(profileIds));
        activity?.SetTag("arg.kind", kind);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithClassDtoCollection"));
            return await instance.MethodWithClassDtoCollection(profileIds, kind);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithClassDtoCollection"));
        }
    }

    public static double MethodWithReadonlyStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coordinates)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lat", coordinates.Lat);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lon", coordinates.Lon);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithReadonlyStruct"));
            return instance.MethodWithReadonlyStruct(coordinates);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto MethodReturningReadonlyStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, double lat, double lon)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodReturningReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.lat", lat);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.lon", lon);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodReturningReadonlyStruct"));
            return instance.MethodReturningReadonlyStruct(lat, lon);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodReturningReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static bool MethodWithInReadonlyStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coordinates, double maxDistance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithInReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.maxDistance", maxDistance);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithInReadonlyStruct"));
            return instance.MethodWithInReadonlyStruct(in coordinates, maxDistance);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithInReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<string> AsyncMethodWithReadonlyStructWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coordinates, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncMethodWithReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lat", coordinates.Lat);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lon", coordinates.Lon);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события AsyncMethodWithReadonlyStruct"));
            return await instance.AsyncMethodWithReadonlyStruct(coordinates, cancellationToken);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события AsyncMethodWithReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto> ValueTaskMethodReturningReadonlyStructWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int locationId)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ValueTaskMethodReturningReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.locationId", locationId);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события ValueTaskMethodReturningReadonlyStruct"));
            return await instance.ValueTaskMethodReturningReadonlyStruct(locationId);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события ValueTaskMethodReturningReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto? MethodWithNullableReadonlyStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int? locationId)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithNullableReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.locationId", locationId);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithNullableReadonlyStruct"));
            return instance.MethodWithNullableReadonlyStruct(locationId);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithNullableReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto?> MethodCombiningCustomTypesWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coordinates, double radius)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodCombiningCustomTypes", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.kind", kind);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lat", coordinates.Lat);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates.Lon", coordinates.Lon);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.radius", radius);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodCombiningCustomTypes"));
            return await instance.MethodCombiningCustomTypes(kind, coordinates, radius);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodCombiningCustomTypes"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<(TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto profile, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto location, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind)> MethodReturningTupleWithCustomTypesWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, long profileId)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodReturningTupleWithCustomTypes", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.profileId", profileId);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodReturningTupleWithCustomTypes"));
            return await instance.MethodReturningTupleWithCustomTypes(profileId);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodReturningTupleWithCustomTypes"));
        }
    }

    public static TEnum GenericMethodWhereEnumWithTrace<TEnum>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string value) where TEnum : struct, Enum
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericMethodWhereEnum", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.value", value);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события GenericMethodWhereEnum"));
            return instance.GenericMethodWhereEnum<TEnum>(value);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события GenericMethodWhereEnum"));
        }
    }

    public static bool MethodWithOutReadonlyStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string address, out TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coordinates)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithOutReadonlyStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.address", address);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithOutReadonlyStruct"));
            return instance.MethodWithOutReadonlyStruct(address, out coordinates);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithOutReadonlyStruct"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<double> MethodWithReadonlyStructCollectionWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, IReadOnlyList<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto> coordinates)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithReadonlyStructCollection", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.coordinates", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(coordinates));

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithReadonlyStructCollection"));
            return await instance.MethodWithReadonlyStructCollection(coordinates);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithReadonlyStructCollection"));
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Dictionary<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind, List<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto>>> MethodWithCustomTypesDictionaryWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto? centerPoint = default, double radiusKm = 10D)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MethodWithCustomTypesDictionary", ActivityKind.Internal);

        activity?.SetTag("arg.filter.Lat", centerPoint?.Lat);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.filter.Lon", centerPoint?.Lon);
        activity?.SetTag("arg.radiusKm", radiusKm);

        try
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события MethodWithCustomTypesDictionary"));
            return await instance.MethodWithCustomTypesDictionary(centerPoint, radiusKm);

        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
            activity?.AddException(ex);
            throw;
        }
        finally
        {
            activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события MethodWithCustomTypesDictionary"));
        }
    }

}
